productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Galvin White Silver Black Shoe
description: Make your runs easier and lighter with these Galvin M trainers from adidas. With its lightweight features, your training is guaranteed to be fast and comfortable.UpperWoven fabric uppers with synthetic overlays for lightweight durability and breathabilitycushioned tongue and collar for extra comfortLace-ups for snug FitThree synthetic overlays across the sides signifying brand motto of performance, perseverance and achievementOutsole extended onto the toe box and embedded onto it for better protection of the forefootBrand name embedded on the tongue and behind collarMidsoleCushioned footbed for all day step-in comfortFull length phylon midsole for lightweight cushioningOutsoleCarbon rubber outsole with arrow lugs for better grip and tractionFlex grooves for better flexibility of the feetToe guard for longer shoe life and protection to the forefootMulti-directional textured outsole for superior grip and maximum tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
